testcase.name: test_config_without_schemas_warning
testcase.failure: tests\unit\infrastructure\api\configs\test_schema_configs.py:483: in test_config_without_schemas_warning assert result.is_valid() # 只是警告 E TypeError: 'bool' object is not callable

testcase.name: test_cache_error_basic

testcase.name: test_cache_key_error
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [KEY_ERROR] 缓存键操作失败 #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'key': 'invalid_key', 'operation': 'get', 'key_type': ''} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_cache_value_error
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [VALUE_ERROR] 缓存值无效 #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'value': None, 'value_type': 'dict', 'size_limit': 0, 'key': 'test_key'} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_cache_connection_error
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [CONNECTION_ERROR] 无法连接到缓存服务器 #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'host': 'localhost', 'port': 6379, 'retry_count': 0, 'should_retry': True, 'connection_type': 'cache_server'} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_cache_timeout_error
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [TIMEOUT_ERROR] 缓存操作超时 #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'operation': 'set', 'timeout_ms': 0, 'timeout_seconds': 0.0, 'retryable': False} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_cache_capacity_error
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [CAPACITY_ERROR] 缓存容量设置无效 #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'capacity': 1000, 'min_capacity': 100, 'max_capacity': 5000} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_cache_consistency_error
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [CONSISTENCY_ERROR] 缓存数据一致性错误 #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'key': 'user:123', 'expected_version': 'v2', 'actual_version': 'v1', 'keys': []} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_cache_serialization_error
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [SERIALIZATION_ERROR] 数据序列化失败 #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'operation': 'complex_object', 'data_type': "<class 'dict'>", 'data': None, 'format': 'json'} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_cache_quota_error
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [QUOTA_ERROR] 超出缓存配额限制 #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'current_usage': 900, 'max_quota': 800} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_exception_inheritance
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [CACHE_ERROR] test #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [KEY_ERROR] test_key #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'key': 'get', 'operation': '', 'key_type': ''} #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [CONNECTION_ERROR] localhost #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'host': 6379, 'port': 0, 'retry_count': 0, 'should_retry': True, 'connection_type': 'cache_server'} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:67 [PIPELINE_ERROR] Operation failed #x1B[1m#x1B[31mERROR #x1B[0m src.infrastructure.cache.exceptions.cache_exceptions:cache_exceptions.py:69 错误详情: {'component': 'RedisCache', 'operation': 'pipeline_execute', 'thread_id': 'Thread-123'} --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------

testcase.name: test_health_checker_multiple_components_check
testcase.failure: tests\unit\infrastructure\health\test_health_deep_enhancement.py:108: in test_health_checker_multiple_components_check assert len(result["results"]) == 4 E AssertionError: assert 3 == 4 E + where 3 = len({'api': {'status': 'healthy'}, 'cache': {'status': 'healthy'}, 'database': {'status': 'healthy'}})

testcase.name: test_health_checker_component_specific_check
testcase.failure: tests\unit\infrastructure\health\test_health_enhancement.py:88: in test_health_checker_component_specific_check assert result["component"] == component E AssertionError: assert 'database' == 'cache' E E #x1B[0m#x1B[91m- cache#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m E #x1B[92m+ database#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m

testcase.name: test_import_deprecation_warning
testcase.failure: tests\unit\infrastructure\test_version.py:30: in test_import_deprecation_warning assert len(w) > 0 E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_utils_data_normalization
testcase.failure: tests\unit\infrastructure\utils\test_utils_deep_enhancement.py:90: in test_utils_data_normalization assert len(result["normalized"]) == len(raw_data) E assert 3 == 5 E + where 3 = len([0.1, 0.2, 0.3]) E + and 5 = len([10, 20, 30, 40, 50])
